/usr/bin/c++  -std=c++17 -Wall -pthread -rdynamic "CMakeFiles/sc-server.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/sc-server.dir/src/sc_server_factory.cpp.o" -o /home/jun-k01/ndtp/nika/problem-solver/sc-machine/bin/sc-server  -Wl,-rpath,/home/jun-k01/ndtp/nika/problem-solver/sc-machine/bin: /home/jun-k01/ndtp/nika/problem-solver/sc-machine/bin/libsc-server-lib.so /home/jun-k01/ndtp/nika/problem-solver/sc-machine/bin/libsc-config-utils.so /home/jun-k01/ndtp/nika/problem-solver/sc-machine/bin/libsc-memory.so /home/jun-k01/ndtp/nika/problem-solver/sc-machine/bin/libsc-core.so ../../thirdparty/antlr/runtime/libantlr4-runtime.a -lcurl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_filesystem.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_atomic.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_program_options.so.1.83.0 -Wl,--export-dynamic -L/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu -lgmodule-2.0 -pthread -lglib-2.0
